scripts.dev: concurrently "corepack pnpm --filter bit-office dev" "corepack pnpm --filter web dev"
scripts.start: corepack pnpm --filter web build && corepack pnpm --filter bit-office start
scripts.build:release: corepack pnpm --filter web build && corepack pnpm --filter bit-office build
scripts.publish:release: pnpm run build:release && cd apps/gateway && npm publish
